tasks.label: git-save-changes
tasks.command: git add .; git commit -m "Fix MongoDB Atlas connection"

tasks.label: git-commit-backend-fix
tasks.command: git add server/src/index.ts & git commit -m "Fix MongoDB Atlas connection"

tasks.label: git-commit-vscode
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json & git commit -m "Add VS Code task configuration"

tasks.label: git-renormalize-vscode
tasks.command: git add --renormalize .vscode/tasks.json & git commit -m "Normalize VS Code tasks line endings"

tasks.label: check-backend-4000
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:4000; Write-Output ('BACKEND_STATUS=' + $r.StatusCode); Write-Output ('BACKEND_BODY=' + $r.Content) } catch { Write-Output ('BACKEND_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message) }"

tasks.label: recheck-local-ports
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { $a=Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:4000; 'BACKEND=' + $a.StatusCode } catch { 'BACKEND_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message }; try { $b=Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:5173; 'FRONTEND=' + $b.StatusCode } catch { 'FRONTEND_ERR=' + $_.Exception.Message }"

tasks.label: create-admin-user
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$body=@{ firstName='Admin'; lastName='Principal'; identification='900000001'; email='admin@aguadevida.com'; phone='3000000000'; address='Aguadevida HQ'; password='Admin12345!'; role='admin' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:4000/api/auth/register -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response -and $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_.Exception.Message } }"

tasks.label: verify-admin-login
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$body=@{ email='admin@aguadevida.com'; password='Admin12345!' } | ConvertTo-Json; try { $r=Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 } catch { if ($_.Exception.Response -and $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()) { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream()); $reader.ReadToEnd() } else { $_.Exception.Message } }"

tasks.label: git-commit-all
tasks.command: git add -A & git commit -m "Update product forms and repo settings"
